name: objectstore-mcp-agent
description: Object-storage agent: list/get/put/copy/move/delete objects, bucket admin, and bulk transfer across S3/MinIO/R2, Google Cloud Storage, Azure Blob, and a zero-infra local filesystem store.

capabilities.name: Graph Flow Execution
capabilities.description: Execute a workflow through the agent's graph orchestration engine

tools.description: Run complex multi-step workflows via Pydantic-Graph
